race.comment: LARGS LEGACY (11) has built nicely into her debut campaign with close minor placings in her last two and should be at her top now fifth up. Is expected to handle the rise in trip on the quick back-up and looks the one to beat. KOHALA (2) finds the maiden win elusive but has got things back on track with minor placings in his last three. Strips rock-hard fit and keeps Holder. Gets his chance. VALUED (5) backs up quickly after a flat effort at Mt Gambier five days ago. Capable of better. QATAR (4) has struggled to threaten so far but strikes a thin maiden and could've just been looking for this longer trip. Keeping safe.
